slides.title: Stop skipping *leg day*.
slides.sub: 5 fixes for legs that actually grow.

slides.title: Hit real *depth*
slides.body: Quarter squats build quarter legs. Break parallel every rep.

slides.title: Train legs *twice a week*
slides.body: Once a week is maintenance, not growth.

slides.title: Add *weight* weekly
slides.body: Same load means the same legs. Push the overload.

slides.title: Don't skip *hamstrings*
slides.body: RDLs and curls build the whole leg, not just quads.

slides.title: Eat your *protein*
slides.body: Aim for 1g per pound of bodyweight, every day.

slides.title: Track your *gains*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs your training, protein and recovery in one place.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your upper body is jacked and your legs are an afterthought because... you skip leg day. 🦵

Depth, frequency, overload, hamstrings, protein. Fix these 5. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks your training, protein & recovery → link in bio.
youtube_title: Stop Skipping Leg Day: 5 Fixes for Real Gains
